name: Cider Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour the bottom only of a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, pumpkin, oil, apple cider or juice, and egg; mix well until smooth.
3. Sift together all purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and cinnamon into another bowl.
4. Stir the dry ingredients just until moistened.
5. Fold in chopped nuts and raisins.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Wrap tightly and store in the refrigerator.
